title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aliens Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aliens Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aliens Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Aliens Group:
Aliens Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aliens Group!
